```python
    def eligible_for_emergency_cash_assistance(self) -> bool:
        income_per_person = self.monthly_income / self.family_size
        return (
            self.monthly_income <= 2000 and
            income_per_person <= 1000 and
            self.age >= 30 and
            self.age <= 60 and
            self.employment_status in ['unemployed', 'retired'] and
            self.family_size >= 2
        )
```
